name: chosen/pricing-tiers
title: Pricing Tiers
description: Three-tier registration pricing by state distance + inclusions list + group discount, raffle and payment-plan callouts. Closes on a Register CTA.

headline.default: One conference. Tiered by where you're coming from.

subhead.default: We know money is rough — and the further you're travelling, the more you're already spending to get here. The tiered pricing is our way of making sure distance isn't a reason to stay home.

default.title: Group discount
default.body: Coming as a group? Bring 10 or more from the same state and everyone gets 10% off. Parish, school or a larger community? Get in touch before you register at info@chosenconference.org.au and we'll sort something out.

default.title: Early registration raffle
default.body: Register early and go in the draw. Every week you're registered before November earns you a raffle ticket. Prizes include full rego covered, rego halved, and 50% off merch. Nine winners total.

default.title: Payment plans
default.body: Need help with the cost? We don't want money to be the reason anyone misses out. Custom payment plans are available — just reach out to info@chosenconference.org.au and we'll work something out together.
